scripts.build:package: mkdir -p .publish/contracts/agent-pay-registry/scripts && esbuild src/public-stdio.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=.publish/main.js && cp ../../docs/agents/SKILL.md .publish/SKILL.md && cp ../../LICENSE .publish/LICENSE && cp ../../contracts/agent-pay-registry/scripts/record-decision-testnet.sh ../../contracts/agent-pay-registry/scripts/record-receipt-testnet.sh .publish/contracts/agent-pay-registry/scripts/ && chmod +x .publish/contracts/agent-pay-registry/scripts/*.sh
scripts.package:check: npm run build:package && node --import tsx scripts/verify-package.ts
scripts.publish:npm: npm run package:check && cd .publish && npm publish --access public
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:package
